title: brachypodium caninum
intro: Brachypodium caninum, also known as dog's tail grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium caninum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
